overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a mountainous landscape at dusk during a storm. The player travels along a cobblestone path through a rocky canyon that opens into a wider valley, encountering a wolf that crosses the path, and continues past a twisted bare tree toward distant peaks.

weathered stone cobblestones forming the walking path
dark overcast clouds with purple-blue dusk lighting visible through the canyon gap

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking through a narrow mountain canyon. Steep rock walls flank both sides of a cobblestone path, with stormy dusk skies visible ahead. The environment is enclosed and atmospheric with low light.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain valley with distant peaks

events.description: wolf emerges from the left side and crosses the cobblestone path ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the path as a wolf crosses from left to right

notable_agents.action: wolf walking across the cobblestone path from left to right

entered.detail: jagged mountain peaks visible in the distance under the stormy sky
gnarled leafless tree with twisted branches visible ahead on the path

segments.scene_description: The canyon opens into a wide mountain valley with expansive views of distant peaks. A wolf crosses the path from left to right ahead of the player. The twisted bare tree becomes visible in the distance as the enclosed canyon walls fall away.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain trail with ancient stone ruins

events.description: passing the twisted bare tree and approaching stone wall ruins on the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the open trail past the twisted tree and alongside stone ruins toward the distant mountains

entered.detail: low ancient stone wall or ruin structure alongside the right side of the path
dense dark forest covering the valley floor in the distance

segments.scene_description: The player continues along the winding cobblestone path through the open mountain landscape, passing the twisted bare tree on the left. Ancient stone ruins appear on the right side of the path while expansive views of the forested valley and distant mountain range dominate the horizon under the stormy dusk sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that transitions from a claustrophobic mountain canyon into a vast, open valley under a stormy dusk sky. It begins by moving along a cobblestone path flanked by steep, enclosing rock walls in low, atmospheric light. As the camera advances, the canyon walls fall away to reveal an expansive mountain landscape where a wolf crosses the path from left to right. The scene then opens further toward a distant, twisted bare tree, which the camera passes on the left as the path winds through the valley. Finally, the view expands to include ancient stone ruins on the right and a wide horizon of forested slopes and distant peaks beneath the darkening storm.
